meaning: adj.阻碍的,令人丧气的,使困惑的,令人莫名其妙的,变幻的,不可理解的
examples: I was constantly ill, with a baffling array of symptoms.
An apple tree producing square fruit is baffling experts.
The ivy was the baffling thing.
But you can expect a complex, lengthy and perhaps baffling ruling or series of rulings.
These trends make the recent attempts to undo healthcare reform all the more baffling.
